def test_process_batch_includes_last_item():
    items = [1, 2, 3, 4]
    expected_results = [item * 2 for item in items]
    
    from source import process_batch
    
    results = process_batch(items)
    
    assert len(results) == len(items), "Output should include all items from the input list, including the last one."
    assert results == expected_results, "Each item in the output should be twice the corresponding input item."
